title: E2E tests for captain planning dashboard
description: Regression coverage for the planning dashboard: scope switching, week scrubber, filters, private-notes isolation from player-facing surfaces, draft→selection hand-off, and responsive breakpoints.
acceptance_criteria: Test: admin session required — unauthenticated request to /admin/league/planning redirects to login
Test: scope chooser switches matrix content (My Teams / My Division / Specific Team / All)
Test: 'My Teams' default fires when user.player_id maps to an active captain
Test: week scrubber prev/next/date-jump changes matrix content
Test: past-season toggle reveals completed seasons
Test: URL query string reflects scope + week and deep-links reproduce the same view
Test: preference filters narrow visible players as expected

Test: captain_player_notes visible on dashboard + admin player detail, NEVER visible on /my-profile/{token}, /my-profile/{token}/history, or /my-availability/{token} — seed a note for regression coverage
Test: create a draft lineup, click 'Promote to selection', land on selection_overview with the draft's players pre-populated
Test: viewport nudge appears on narrow portrait mobile; 'View anyway' escape works; nudge absent at tablet+ widths
Tests use seeded admin credentials and seeded captain relations from fixtures/seed.sql

files_to_modify: tests/e2e/fixtures/seed.sql — seed lineup draft and captain note for regression coverage

testing_requirements: make test-e2e passes with these specs included
Tests are resilient to copy tweaks (data-testid / ARIA selectors)

context.user_story: As a maintainer, I want the captain dashboard's behaviour and the critical leak-prevention guarantees to be CI-enforced.
